ocr.text: In the FY2023 Municipal Debt Service Ratios table, CityA exhibits a Debt Service Ratio of 12.5%, with a Total Debt of
$1,200M and a Debt Per Capita of $600, reflecting a Yearly Change of 5.0%. CityB shows a 10.2% Debt Service Ratio, Total
Debt of $950M, Debt Per Capita of $550, and a Yearly Change of 3.5%. CityC has an 8.0% Debt Service Ratio, $800M in Total
Debt, $500 Debt Per Capita, and a Yearly Change of 2.0%. CityD presents a 15.0% Debt Service Ratio, $1,500M Total Debt,
$700 Debt Per Capita, with a Yearly Change of 6.0%. CityE records a Debt Service Ratio of 9.5%, $900M Total Debt, $530
Debt Per Capita, and a Yearly Change of 4.5%.
